creator: andrew@grillet.co.uk
text:
Note that I was  trying to use a static IP address. If you use DHCP, it
works OK.

Also note that I get an error message about "ral0 multicast callback", but
its gone from the screen before I can make a note of it.

There is no option to make the WPAA PSK visible while typing it - very
difficult with non-meaingful string sequences.
